inputContract.policyRepoPaths: policy.git natural-language policy paths are inputs only until compiled and traced

requiredNativeOutputs.purpose: activation scope, actor, condition, and effective boundary
forbidden behavior, destructive cases, and rejection reasons
actor/role binding derived from semantic policy records
role exit, handoff, or supersession edge derived from semantic policy records

runtimeContracts.compiler: deterministic, offline, no network, no policy.git mutation
runtimeContracts.freshAgentTest: a fresh agent can run the parse/trace/counterexample checks from this contract without hidden local state
runtimeContracts.inputReader: reads policy.git paths as source evidence only
runtimeContracts.projectionWriter: emits JSONL rows plus projection edges; generated rows are candidates until accepted by governance gates

semanticCoverage.blockerEvidenceUse: old counts may appear only as blocker evidence with source and timestamp
semanticCoverage.forbidden: coverage may not be asserted from a hardcoded old count
semanticCoverage.required: every native output row traces to an exact source span and semantic node
